payload.label: clock
payload.short_description: white clock face with Roman numerals
payload.long_description: Partial, slightly blurred white circular clock face showing black Roman numerals and dark clock hands with a reflective metallic rim visible at the lower-right; crop is edge-cut and the image is low-resolution with glare, photographed from close range (approximately 0.5–0.8 m).
